summary: Reworked the opening so it no longer mirrors chapter 7's relative-time scaffold and added a brief carryover from Elise's hidden-ledger decision in chapter 5; the trapdoor/alias ending already handed cleanly into chapter 7 and was left intact.
edits: Rewrote the opening paragraph around Elise's sensory arrival in the yard instead of a matching relative-time construction.
Added a short reference to the ledger still hidden in the chalk niche to carry chapter 5's consequence into Elise's morning watchfulness.
